title: Anne of the Island
summaries: "Anne of the Island" by L. M. Montgomery is a novel published in 1915. Anne Shirley leaves Prince Edward Island for the first time to attend Redmond College in Nova Scotia, embarking on new adventures with old and new friends. As she navigates college life, romantic proposals, and questions of true love, Anne must discover what her heart truly desires—and whether the ideal she's always imagined matches reality.
